title: Comply with legal aspects of a service and repair contract in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Comply with legal aspects of a service and repair contract in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret service and repair contract

pcs.text: Legal obligations of all parties involved in a valid service and repair contract are identified1.2 Legal liabilities of repairer performing work without a valid service and repair contract are identified1.3 Regulatory bodies with authority to inspect the workplace if the customer takes legal action are identified1.4 Workplace service and repair contract is analysed to determine relevant legal compliance requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Legal obligations of all parties involved in a valid service and repair contract are identified1.2 Legal liabilities of repairer performing work without a valid service and repair contract are identified1.3 Regulatory bodies with authority to inspect the workplace if the customer takes legal action are identified1.4 Workplace service and repair contract is analysed to determine relevant legal compliance requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Legal obligations of all parties involved in a valid service and repair contract are identified1.2 Legal liabilities of repairer performing work without a valid service and repair contract are identified1.3 Regulatory bodies with authority to inspect the workplace if the customer takes legal action are identified1.4 Workplace service and repair contract is analysed to determine relevant legal compliance requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Interpret service and repair contract

elements.title: Comply with service and repair contract requirements

pcs.text: Procedures are implemented to advise customers of the terms of contract into which they are entering2.2 Procedures are implemented to ensure staff only use valid service and repair contracts2.3 Procedures are implemented to minimise liability or customer claims in relation to bailment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Procedures are implemented to advise customers of the terms of contract into which they are entering2.2 Procedures are implemented to ensure staff only use valid service and repair contracts2.3 Procedures are implemented to minimise liability or customer claims in relation to bailment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Procedures are implemented to advise customers of the terms of contract into which they are entering2.2 Procedures are implemented to ensure staff only use valid service and repair contracts2.3 Procedures are implemented to minimise liability or customer claims in relation to bailment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Comply with service and repair contract requirements

elements.title: Establish service and repair warranty requirements

pcs.text: Warranties document is developed detailing requirements3.2 Procedures are implemented to ensure staff are aware of warranty requirements3.3 Warranty requirements are documented and stored according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Warranties document is developed detailing requirements3.2 Procedures are implemented to ensure staff are aware of warranty requirements3.3 Warranty requirements are documented and stored according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Warranties document is developed detailing requirements3.2 Procedures are implemented to ensure staff are aware of warranty requirements3.3 Warranty requirements are documented and stored according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Establish service and repair warranty requirements

elements.title: Enforce service and repair contract requirements

pcs.text: Workplace policy on payment terms for services provided are implemented according to workplace procedures4.2 Workplace legal rights and obligations when selling or disposing of uncollected vehicles or goods are identified and observed as required4.3 Legal procedures to recover payment when a customer defaults are identified and implemented as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Workplace policy on payment terms for services provided are implemented according to workplace procedures4.2 Workplace legal rights and obligations when selling or disposing of uncollected vehicles or goods are identified and observed as required4.3 Legal procedures to recover payment when a customer defaults are identified and implemented as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Workplace policy on payment terms for services provided are implemented according to workplace procedures4.2 Workplace legal rights and obligations when selling or disposing of uncollected vehicles or goods are identified and observed as required4.3 Legal procedures to recover payment when a customer defaults are identified and implemented as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Enforce service and repair contract requirements

elements.title: Conduct dispute resolution processes

pcs.text: Procedures to minimise disputes with customers are implemented5.2 Workplace records are maintained to support outcomes in any customer disputes5.3 External sources of assistance in dispute resolution are identified5.4 Outcomes of customer disputes and resolutions are analysed to develop procedures to avoid future disputes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Procedures to minimise disputes with customers are implemented5.2 Workplace records are maintained to support outcomes in any customer disputes5.3 External sources of assistance in dispute resolution are identified5.4 Outcomes of customer disputes and resolutions are analysed to develop procedures to avoid future disputes?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Conduct dispute resolution processes
